calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-03-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:52am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk K. Liu, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Yadira Bassett present by attorney Lorraine M. Walsh bar # 105310. Respondent, Reynaldo Mendoza present in pro per. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles.

EXRA: Accident photoes.
EXA1: Copies of photoes and diagran of intersection; collectively remarked.

10:03am
Exhibits retained. Case submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-23-2011 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-23-2011 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
